programme.title: On The Edge Of Chaos : Reimagining A Hong Kong Icon
programme.desc: We follow the renovation team as they embark on a mission to breathe a new life into The Magistracy, Hong Kong's former central courthouse.

programme.title: E1 - Part 1
programme.desc: Australian restaurateur Michelle Garnaut opened M on the Bund, 25 years ago, and it quickly became known as the restaurant that reinvented fine-dining in Shanghai.

programme.title: TV Theatre
programme.desc: Excellent TV Series

programme.title: Direct Broadcasting Of HK,Macou And Taiwan
programme.desc: Report the up to day news of Hongkong、Macou and Taiwan. Invite the top news analyst to anatomy the events.

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Masters Of Cantonese Cuisine
programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. Through detailed data collection and interpretation of strict logic and reasoning, with the audience close to the truth behind the events, it prys into the mysteries of the magical world.

programme.title: TV Theatre
programme.desc: Excellent TV Series

programme.desc: Discover the science behind the IMAX Experience and get versed in the mechanics and safety of movie weaponry by a military technical advisor.

programme.title: E1 - Attention Bad Shoppers
programme.desc: Mark Rober and the team exact revenge on inconsiderate shoppers who over-indulge on free samples at a booby-trapped farmers' market stand.

programme.title: E1 - A Trip To The Moon
programme.desc: Matt and Zack get blasted into space to uncover the truth about the moon.

programme.title: E2 - Human Kind Bud
programme.desc: Matt and Zack get blasted back to the Stone Age for a human family reunion.

programme.title: E2 - How To Kill An Asteroid
programme.desc: Across the globe, scientists, engineers and astronauts are gearing up for a cosmic battle to hunt asteroids and prevent them from hitting us.

programme.title: E6 - Born With Four Legs
programme.desc: Arun, from India, has four legs, with the second pair growing from his back. We film him travelling to Delhi to seek an operation.

programme.title: E2 - Pewter Flasks; Potato Salad; Hydrogen Fuel Cells; Engineered Wood Siding
programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: Pewter Flasks; Potato Salad; Hydrogen Fuel Cells; Engineered Wood Siding.

programme.title: E1 - Backhoe Brawl!
programme.desc: Three different crews battle it out in a test to find America's best operators - operating powerful excavators, racing backhoes, and maneuvering agile skid steers.

programme.title: E10 - Curse Of Relic Mountain
programme.desc: The decapitated statues of Mount Nemrut and their eventual destruction have mystified experts for centuries.

programme.title: E4 - Forging Excalibur
programme.desc: Adam Savage and a world-class swordsmith team up to forge King Arthur's sword Excalibur, and their investigation could reveal if the legendary blade was made from iron.

programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy can't agree on the better character, Tom or Jerry, so they play a little game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Pan

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E16 -Racing Slicks
programme.desc: The Jelly Beans disappoint Slinkman when they spend all their box car money, but they redeem themselves by winning the race anyway using their own original contraption!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E18 -The Wig Of Why
programme.desc: Lazlo finds a wig and pretends he's a swami making predictions, but the campers are truly spooked when the predictions come true.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2E20 -Lions And Lambs
programme.desc: Van Kleiss has found a way to enhance Breach's powers so she can now open portals in time.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1E21 -Prickly Pining Dining
programme.desc: Lumpus 'dines and dashes' at the town restaurant, and he would've gotten away with it if he hadn't left those darn Jelly Beans behind!

programme.title: When Night Falls In Vienna
programme.desc: Vienna is beautiful. Surrounded by elegant imperial facades, people enjoy culture and coffee. Or, they might clatter past St. Stephen's Cathedral and the Sisi Museum in horse-drawn carriages. But when night falls, the city shows itself in a whole new light.

programme.title: Ethiopia's Electric Vehicle Revolution
programme.desc: Electric buses and taxis are reshaping transport in Addis Ababa. Plus: In South Africa, how invasive biomass is transformed into low‑carbon bricks and new jobs.

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Hard Times: Lost On Long Island
programme.desc: Featuring Long Islanders who lost their jobs in the Great Recession, this documentary looks at the realities of long-term, white-collar unemployment in America.

programme.title: Wishful Drinking
programme.desc: Carrie Fisher tells her raucous, raw and intoxicating true story in this documentary, recounting her peaks and valleys with unfailing candour and biting humour.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Based on true events at the 1972 Olympics, a hostage crisis forces TV exec Arledge to push an untested sports producer to report live news.

programme.title: E1160
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Based on true events at the 1972 Olympics, a hostage crisis forces TV exec Arledge to push an untested sports producer to report live news.

Soda
programme.desc: Host Steve Spangler is famous for throwing Mentos in a bottle of soda to create a gushing soda geyser. In this episode he “supersizes” that stunt with a hundred soda bottles. Other demonstrations show which other fun things you can do at home with soda.

programme.title: The Tessell Nation
programme.desc: In this episode we learn about tessellations: shapes repeated over and over again covering a plane without any gaps or overlaps. Can mathemagician Eric create a tessellation that has the shape of his own head?

programme.title: Animal Coexistence
programme.desc: Philippe travels to Australia to catch the world's deadliest jellyfish. Then he heads off to see the Californian Condor, and to discover what is being done to protect the endangered Hawaiian Monk Seal in Maui.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Jet Powered Zipline
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts enlist Heni's leaf blower and some science to make the zipline go faster.

programme.title: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: When the honey in the community garden's beehive turns bright indigo, Addison is on the case to find out what's giving the bees the blues.

programme.title: Plastic Spoon
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse spoons to make some cute DIY's.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: You Ain't Seen Nothing Yeti
programme.desc: The annual winter carnival seems to be in trouble when Addison and Alex's yeti sculpture appears to have been vandalized... perhaps by an actual angry yeti!

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: Socks are not just to keep your feet warm! Hepi and Briko have some interesting sock-themed ideas.

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Bhilka Diamond
programme.desc: A valuable diamond has been stolen, and Sprinter is on the case. But all the clues point to himself. How can that be?

programme.title: Pizza
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula showcase the art of pizza making.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Telescope
programme.desc: Henry meets a giant observatory telescope, and becomes an Astronomer to help Telescope track down a new constellation he discovered.

programme.title: Hedgehog
programme.desc: Fleabag and Plop fall in love with the baby hedgehog, and Grandad Badger learns more about these spiky little creatures. Tiny Owl does his best to teach Mommy and Daddy about the hedgehog, but they insist that the spiky thing on TV is a hairbrush.

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Squeeze
programme.desc: When the team wants a new water slide for the clubhouse beach, they decide to fund it by selling Anabella's delicious lemonade. But the slide costs a lot, and they want it fast! So how can they sell as much lemonade as possible? They split into two teams.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Socks
programme.desc: Socks are not just to keep your feet warm! Hepi and Briko have some interesting sock-themed ideas.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

E6 - Kimberley And Paul
programme.desc: Avid ocean-lovers Kimberley and Paul are moving to the East Coast to retire and live out their seafront dream. But their big dreams come with a lot of water toys that they need to accommodate.

programme.title: E2 - Roasted Garlic And Rosemary Prime Rib
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: The Top 4 contestants compete for a chance to win $10,000 in travel vouchers, after each picking a mystery ingredient inspired by the judge's personal travel adventures.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: E3 - Holiday Lasagne
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: E3 - Holiday Lasagne
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Hellboy: The Crooked Man
programme.desc: Hellboy and a rookie BPRD agent get stranded in 1950s rural Appalachia, only to discover a small community haunted by witches, led by the Crooked Man.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Dumb And Dumber
programme.desc: For Harry and Lloyd, every day is a no-brainer. Catch Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels in this madcap comedy guaranteed to leave you in stitches.

programme.title: Dumb And Dumber
programme.desc: For Harry and Lloyd, every day is a no-brainer. Catch Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels in this madcap comedy guaranteed to leave you in stitches.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva, a kind-hearted young woman, discovers she is the true heir to the wealthy Cortes family. As she fights for justice and her identity, she falls in love with Inno, a member of the same family. Their romance is tested by secrets, betrayal, and tragedy, all centered around a powerful family legacy.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E9 - Samantha's Secret Spell
programme.desc: Endora turns Ralph Jackman into a mouse at midnight.

programme.title: E10 - Daddy Comes for a Visit
programme.desc: Entranced with a little magic, Darrin decides to go for bigger things.

programme.title: E5 - The Boondoggle
programme.desc: When an investigative reporter comes to Walton's Mountain to write a historical guide to the State of Virginia, he uncovers a secret that embarrasses the Baldwin sisters and angers the rest of the community.

programme.title: E3 - Greenshaw's Folly (Part 1)
programme.desc: On a stormy night, family friend Louisa seeks Miss Marple’s help. Marple sends Louisa and her son to Greenshaw’s Folly, where Louisa becomes secretary to the eccentric Miss Greenshaw—soon drawing attention and becoming entangled in danger at the estate.

programme.title: E5 - The Boondoggle
programme.desc: When an investigative reporter comes to Walton's Mountain to write a historical guide to the State of Virginia, he uncovers a secret that embarrasses the Baldwin sisters and angers the rest of the community.

programme.title: E26 - The Chili King
programme.desc: Tony's unauthorized chili is 'hot' not because of the sauce, but because of his conniving cousin Arvel.

programme.title: E5 - Part 5
programme.desc: The Blue and the Gray is told through John Geyser, an eyewitness to the stirring events of the Civil War that shaped the history of America to the present day.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years’ worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years’ worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E526 - Pups Save A Tower Of Pizza
programme.desc: Adventure Bay is working hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas!

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E111 - Cake-Tastrophe!
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck's baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It's up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: E406 - Dora And Diego And The Big Boy Bears!
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami!

programme.title: E141 - Chloe's Puppet Show
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit their cousin Chloe's house, where they put on a puppet show about a pig who snores a lot. Daddy Pig and Uncle Pig miss the show as they are too busy snoring.

programme.title: E142 - Daddy Gets Fit
programme.desc: Peppa instructs Daddy Pig to do lots of exercise to do as he is a bit fat. Daddy Pig is horrified to learn you have to exercise every day to get fit.

programme.title: E751 - Playgroup Star
programme.desc: Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star in school for drawing a wonderful picture of her house!

programme.title: E801 - The Panda Twins
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda brings his twin daughters Peggi and Pandora Panda to playgroup for the first time.

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E848 - Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E851 - Mandy Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: E848 - Science Museum
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go on a school trip to visit a science museum. There are lots of fun activities including bubbly water, static balloons and Grampy Rabbit's rocket ship.

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E206 - Partly Claudia / Ranita's Magic Stripes
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: E220 - The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station / The Crew Builds A Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove. // After a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E111 - Cake-Tastrophe!
programme.desc: When a hungry Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck's baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away! It's up to AJ and Blaze to track down all the rampaging robots before Axle City is blanketed in baked goods.

programme.title: E220 - The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E17 - Calypso
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: E18 - The Doctor
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: E4 - Treasure In The Plant Aisle
programme.desc: In the perilous plant aisle Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure as they have half a map each, but she tricks him and steals the map to find the treasure for herself.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E10 - Charlotte's Irish Boxty
programme.desc: Charlotte makes an Irish boxty for her friends. She uses mashed and grated potatoes to make her boxty and tops it with a cooked egg. She hopes her friends will really like it.

programme.title: E4 - Squash
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E4 - Squash
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: E71 - Didgeridoo
programme.desc: Tinky Winky learns to play the didgeridoo. The Teletubbies do a special didgeridoo Tubby Phone Dance. Tiddlytubby Ping loves the didgeridoo too!

programme.title: E5 - Rocket
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rocket' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure

programme.title: E21 - Micro Okido
programme.desc: Zim and Zam have discovered the lost city of Micro OKIDO.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E30 - Barky Boats
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain; when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: E11 - Cats
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: E2 - The Whistling Badge
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: E12 - White Cliffs Of Dover, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: E15 - Holiday
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: E25 - It's Time For A Surprise
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran and Panda are helping Cynthia in her garden - JoJo loves how tall the sunflowers are. Cynthia gives JoJo a present of some sunflower seeds - JoJo can keep them ready to plant and grow more sunflowers next year.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E43 - Bird Migration: Spain & Africa
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: E70
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Working-class Taara and wealthy heir Yuvraaj defy class for a deep, undeniable love. But with family honour at stake, can Yuvraaj choose her over his legacy?

programme.title: E593
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E746
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5116
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E859
programme.desc: Jhanak, determined to keep her mother's vow, embarks on a life-changing path. Facing hardships and loss, she encounters a man who adds a new layer of complexity to her journey.

programme.title: Want To Have Sex With You Vol.9
E3 - Richard Ruben In All Intimacy
programme.desc: Comedian Richard Ruben opens the doors of his home and offers a very intimate portrait alongside his family. Also, the surprising story of surfing in Belgium, the 100 years of the Forum of Liege, and a 3D printer in the rehabilitation department of the CHU of Liege.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E9 - Le Fil Paris
programme.desc: Lyn Abdel Rahman presents Le Fil Paris, the brand she founded with Filza Marri, featuring a responsible philosophy focused on human beings and zero waste and with an initial fashion show in tribute to Lebanon and Pakistan.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E7 - On The Yamagata Road 1
programme.desc: In Yamagata, we visited Yachiyo Restaurant, which used to be a drive-in. We then head to Otaki Drive-in Izumiya where we enjoyed the Miso Ramen set meal.

programme.title: E8 - On The Yamagata Road 2
programme.desc: Our trip to Yamagata takes us to the Shonai region. At Shirafuji Drive-in, we discovered molokheiya ramen, noodles with vegetables kneaded into them.

programme.title: E2 - Siblings Month: Building Together!
programme.desc: The siblings are building together! First, Baby John tries to build a tower with blocks, but when they fall, Jack & Jill help him build a tower of toys all the way to the ceiling! Then, the kids work together to create a makeshift star for the Christmas tree. The building fun continues as they make toy boats & set up a doll hospital to fix a broken doll. From building a snow palace to helping a lost starfish, they do it all together!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Favorite Animal Songs!
programme.desc: Sing along to Baby John's favorite animal songs! First, the kids welcome a new puppy named Bingo to the family & sing the classic nursery rhyme about him! Then, the family acts out the story of Humpty Dumpty Sat on a Wall. The animal fun continues as Baby John spends the day at the aquarium & runs into Baby Shark! He learns the 'Baby Shark' dance & has an exciting dance marathon! Plus, the family dresses up like little dinosaurs!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.desc: In the final qualifying round, three teams tackle RoboClean at a hawker centre and Delivery Dash in a warehouse. Only one secures the final spot in the finale.

programme.title: E221 - No Pictures, Please / Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. // SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life!

programme.title: E226 - Chatterbox Gary / Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. Everyone loves it... except for Squidward! // When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: E501 - Flabber Gassed
programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger & Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: E218 - iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly’s old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly’s best friend.

programme.title: E213 - The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: E303 - A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: E523 - A Tale of Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.desc: An iCarly fan, Valerie, asks Freddie on a date. The date goes so well that Freddie begins filming Valerie's own web show. But when Valerie's web show interferes with iCarly, Freddie finds himself torn.

programme.desc: Jason shares his love of fresh produce with a trip to a supersized Dubai vegetable market as he makes dishes that include a tomato tartare with black olive tapenade and a pudding made with beetroot and carrot. programme.title: Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard
Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard
72 Tenants of Prosperity
programme.desc: Past and present survival of the common man in the big city - ups and downs, laughters and tears... In 1970s Hong Kong, rapacious landlords try to evict 72 tenants but sworn brothers Ha Kugn and Shek Kin help the group of 72 defeat the landlord and landlady and coincidentally rescue Pinky from a planned forced marriage. When both sworn brothers fall for Pinky and propose to her, she flips a coin 'heads or tails' and Ha wins her hand in marriage. The sworn brothers become sworn enemies and Shek's hatred fuels intense rivalry against Ha in business dealings ranging from the manufacture of plastic flowers to the selling of stinky bean curd. Even after 40 years they continue to clash and in 2010 they are in keen competition selling electronics appliances in Sai Yeung Choi Street, Mongkok, the busiest street in the city and still home to the 72 tenants. In fiercely competitive Sai Yeung Choi Street high rents force businessmen to use every means to survive, with electronics shops

programme.title: As It Burns
programme.desc: An explosion takes place in an apartment late at night, detective Ngai Wan arrives for the investigation and a charred woman body found on spot, her name is Yin Ching. Ching is getting married with Ng Lam who grew up in a wealthy family. Though it seems to be an accident, Wan feels that something is unusual. Wan first investigate the background of Ching and finds that her mother was died in a fire accident fifteen years ago also. Before that, Ching and her mother were in a difficult relationship, Lo Chi Fung was the only person Ching could talk to. They both grew up in Pak Sin Town and disappeared together after the accident happened. Wan perseveres in the investigation but the case just like falling into the mist as everyone related to Ching are all hiding some secrets. The turning point comes out until Lo Chi Fung and his girlfriend Lam Yam show up. The two fatal cases are crossing fifteen years, everyone can be suspected. The truth is far beyond everyone's imagination behi

programme.title: E5 - Kerry Lynn Dalton
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene 'Melanie' May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: E4 - Dark Mode
programme.desc: When two teenage classmates in Northern California go missing within weeks of each other, their mothers struggle to get police to take the situation seriously.

programme.title: E2 - Freeway Shooter Or Innocent Father?
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man is charged with domestic terrorism after a spree of shootings on the freeway sends the public into panic. Facing over 100 years in prison, the young father claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E8 - 揭秘三星堆青銅神樹
programme.desc: 世界遺產探訪紀實文化類節目，由單霽翔、周韻、肖央、牛駿峰擔任「世遺守護人」，通過與當地的人文學者、申遺專家等進行交流，揭秘中國世界遺產背後的故事，呈現中國世界文化遺產的新奇觀、新地標、新景象、新人文。

programme.title: Binny & Family
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: E9 - The Mystery Of Machu Picchu
programme.desc: With 500-year-old secrets hidden in skeletons and stone, Machu Picchu is one of the most puzzling archaeological sites on earth. Who built this astonishing complex, and why?

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: On The Run
programme.desc: Crack policeman Hsiang Ming is having a talk with his separated wife when a bullet from hired killer Ah Chui kills the wife, an anti-drug policewoman. Hsiang Ming goes after the killer but is told to keep off by senior officer Lu. In fact, Lu is head of a narcotics ring and lover of Hsiang Ming's ex-wife. She knows his secret, thus Lu hires Ah Chui to kill her. Then Lu sets about to kill every one connected with crime-the go-between and Ah Chui. On his death bed, the go-between tells Hsiang Ming where to find Ah Chui. This Hsiang Ming does. But Lu's men are coming to kill both of them. Hsiang Ming has to fight off the attackers. Hsiang Ming takes Ah Chui to his mother-in-law's house where Ah Chui meets Hsiang Ming's daughter and feels shameful. When Lu's men come, she saves the young girl and an injured Hsiang Ming. As Hsiang Ming's friends fail to stop Lu, Ah Chui takes Hsiang Ming to a secret hide out and nurses him. They become lovers...
